summary: Tightened qd roadmap validation so node records must use explicit status, priority, risk, and kind vocabularies.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects unknown nodes[].status values outside blocked, claimed, done, mergeable, ready, and review.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: validate_roadmap_nodes constrains nodes[].status to the accepted qd node states; evidence/m4-qd-node-schema-contract/negative-smoke-unknown-status.log records a temporary export copy failing with status=unknown-status.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects unknown nodes[].priority values outside P0, P1, P2, and P3.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: validate_roadmap_nodes constrains nodes[].priority to P0, P1, P2, and P3; evidence/m4-qd-node-schema-contract/negative-smoke-unknown-priority.log records a temporary export copy failing with priority=P9.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects unknown nodes[].risk values outside low, medium, and high.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: validate_roadmap_nodes constrains nodes[].risk to low, medium, and high; evidence/m4-qd-node-schema-contract/negative-smoke-unknown-risk.log records a temporary export copy failing with risk=critical.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects unknown nodes[].kind values outside feature, infra, docs, and audit-fix.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: validate_roadmap_nodes constrains nodes[].kind to feature, infra, docs, and audit-fix; evidence/m4-qd-node-schema-contract/negative-smoke-unknown-kind.log records a temporary export copy failing with kind=task.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Existing qd reports and roadmap export pass the stricter check.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-node-schema-contract/just-qd-reports-check.log records just qd-reports-check passing with the stricter node checks.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Linux validation evidence records just qd-reports-check, nix develop -c just check, and temporary-copy negative smoke tests for unknown node status, priority, risk, and kind.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-node-schema-contract contains just-qd-reports-check.log, just-check.log, git-diff-check.log, and four temporary-copy negative smoke logs.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: No macOS-specific validation is claimed or required.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: This is repository qd metadata validation only; realWorldValidation is marked not_required.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd metadata validation only; no product runtime, macOS, hardware, capture, encode, transport, decode, render, presentation, or latency behavior is claimed.
